chapter_title.ar: باب السَّلَمِ فِي الرَّقِيقِ وَ غَيْرِهِ مِنَ الْحَيَوَانِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 98 – The submission of advance payment regarding the slave and others from the animals

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/255)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: صحيح على الظاهر - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/255)
text: أَبَاهُ لَمْ يَكُنْ يَرَى بَأْساً بِالسَّلَمِ فِي الْحَيَوَانِ بِشَيْ‏ءٍ مَعْلُومٍ إِلَى أَجَلٍ مَعْلُومٍ .

en.hubeali: Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Sayf Bin Ameyra, from Abu Maryam Al Ansary,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> that his<sup>asws</sup> father<sup>asws</sup> did not view anything wrong with the submission of the advance payment regarding an animal when its age and (buying) conditions are (fully) defined’.
en.sarwar: 5. Ahmad ibn Muhammad has narrated from Ali ibn al-Hakam from Sayf ibn ‘Amirah from abu Maryam al-Ansariy who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said that his father would not consider advance payment to buy an animal unlawful for a clearly known merchandise and time.”
